topic: How blue light delays melatonin by 90 minutes
caption: Did you know blue light exposure can delay melatonin production by 90 minutes? 🌃💡 Learn how to protect your sleep and regulate your circadian rhythms. 🕰️ Here are the facts: blue light suppresses melatonin, leading to poor sleep quality 🛋️. Limit screen time before bed and use blue light filtering glasses or apps 📊. Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #bluelight #melatonin #sleephealth #circadianrhythms #sleepquality
